title: Better Pets Mobs
description: A friendly and creature-focused modpack that adds new pets, companion mobs, tamable creatures, and improved animal behaviors. Perfect for players who love collecting, raising, and adventuring with unique companions.
body:
![image 1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e6ed1c6baf766e8a3264cb92537bd6456e51d48.png)

This Pets & Mobs modpack transforms Minecraft into a vibrant world filled with life, companionship, and creature diversity. Explore new biomes and structures to find unique pets—ranging from magical animals and elemental creatures to rare fantasy companions and upgraded versions of vanilla mobs. Each pet features its own personality, abilities, and progression system, allowing you to build a full team of helpful allies. Some companions can assist in combat, gather resources, provide buffs, or protect your base, while others serve as adorable partners in your adventure.

Beyond pets, the modpack introduces improved wildlife and custom mobs that make the world feel dynamic and alive. Animals behave more realistically, small critters populate forests and caves, and mystical creatures roam enchanted areas. Whether you're taming creatures, breeding rare species, collecting cosmetic variants, or training powerful battle companions, the pack is designed to offer a peaceful yet exciting gameplay experience.

Performance-enhancing mods are included to ensure stability and smooth FPS, even with many mobs active at once. Perfect for collectors, explorers, builders, or players who simply want a cozier and more lively Minecraft world, this modpack focuses on creativity, companionship, and the joy of discovering new creatures everywhere you go.
